value.value: @if(equals(pipeline().parameters.encoding_flag, 'true'), concat('encoded_', pipeline().parameters.env, '_', base64(concat(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret, '_', pipeline().parameters.env))), concat('raw_', pipeline().parameters.env, '_', pipeline().parameters.raw_secret))

@concat('env=', pipeline().parameters.env, '|encoded=', variables('encoded_value'), '|decoded=', variables('decoded_value'), '|roundtrip_check=', if(equals(base64ToString(base64(concat(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret, '_', pipeline().parameters.env))), concat(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret, '_', pipeline().parameters.env)), 'PASS', 'FAIL'), '|nested_encode=', base64(concat(base64(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret), '_', base64(pipeline().parameters.env))))

body.value: @json(concat('{"pipeline_name":"nested_base64_encode_decode_chain","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","encoding_flag":"', pipeline().parameters.encoding_flag, '","original_secret_b64":"', if(equals(pipeline().parameters.encoding_flag, 'true'), base64(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret), 'encoding_disabled'), '","roundtrip_decoded":"', if(equals(pipeline().parameters.encoding_flag, 'true'), base64ToString(base64(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret)), pipeline().parameters.raw_secret), '","nested_b64":"', base64(concat(base64(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret), '_', pipeline().parameters.env)), '","nested_decoded":"', base64ToString(base64(concat(base64(pipeline().parameters.raw_secret), '_', pipeline().parameters.env))), '","final_result":"', variables('final_result'), '","run_id":"', pipeline().RunId, '"}'))
